name: Add Advertisements to Facebook Shop Home Page Carousel
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Link your Facebook shop to Neto by following the steps in "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1060-set-up-a-facebook-or-instagram-product-feed", "children": [{"text": "this article"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Webstore", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Advertising Campaigns", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Add New Advertising Campaign", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: Screen Shot 2024-09-26 at 10.54.13 am.png]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Under "}, {"text": "Banner, Carousel Slide or Text Advert", "bold": true}, {"text": " select "}, {"text": "Add New", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: Screen Shot 2024-09-26 at 10.55.17 am.png]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Group", "bold": true}, {"text": " field select "}, {"text": "Facebook.", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: Screen Shot 2024-09-26 at 10.58.11 am.png]"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This group will be used for controlling the adverts on your Facebook shop."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add your advert details to the campaign that has now been created. Using the "}, {"text": "Ad Builder", "bold": true}, {"text": " upload an image for the advert. You can also add text, however it is not required."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ":If you upload an "}, {"text": "Image", "bold": true}, {"text": " that is larger than the space provided for the image on your website the system will resize the image to fit the space."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Select Location For Ad To Appear", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down box, choose "}, {"text": "Web Page", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Home", "bold": true}, {"text": " and then click the "}, {"text": "+ Add", "bold": true}, {"text": " button, and enter a "}, {"text": "Date Start", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Date End", "bold": true}, {"text": " for your campaign."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you don't have the web page option, choose "}, {"text": "Information Page", "bold": true}, {"text": " instead."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: Screen Shot 2024-09-26 at 11.24.29 am.jpg]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to complete the configuration."}]}]}]}]
